overview.description: The FT Vest U.S. Equity Buffer & Digital Return ETF - April (DGAP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund seeks to deliver a defined return profile tied to the price performance of the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY), providing a 10% downside buffer and a fixed digital return over a set outcome period through the use of FLEX Options. DGAP was launched on Apr 17, 2026 and is issued by First Trust.
